title: BoxDef Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function BoxDef (BoxNumber As Integer) As Boolean
parameters: BoxNumber	Integer expression representing the area number from 1 to 15.
description: Returns whether Box has been defined or not.
see_also:
Box, BoxClr

BoxDef Example

VB Example:

x = m_spel.BoxDef(1)

C# Example:

x = m_spel.BoxDef(1);
